view.title: Validate explicit UC need #2
view.subtitle: Exploratory validation passed: The requirement for queue ETA signal support to create temporary unavailability windows is satisfied.

blocks.title: Uc Need Validate 2 completed
blocks.message: Exploratory validation passed: The requirement for queue ETA signal support to create temporary unavailability windows is satisfied.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The evidence provided demonstrates that the system successfully creates a blocked window based on the queue ETA signal, which aligns with the requirement. Specifically, the action request for blocking the calendar window was executed successfully, as indicated by the domain event showing a blackout created for the specified time range. This confirms that the system can handle temporary unavailability windows as required.
